# SimpleWeather

A modern weather app built with React and Vite. Built as an educational pet-project.


![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/108612918/581678861-bc128b62-b22c-43e3-b2fa-023d42de88a9.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY4MTQ2NTAsIm5iZiI6MTc3NjgxNDM1MCwicGF0aCI6Ii8xMDg2MTI5MTgvNTgxNjc4ODYxLWJjMTI4YjYyLWIyMmMtNDNlMy1iMmZhLTAyM2Q0MmRlODhhOS5wbmc_.U24TEdgBTgTGX5TXICiaiX03JCGePm6aVK8Pgj0JrXc)

Available at https://weather.chel0.dev

### Features

- Current weather, bi-hourly and daily forecast (OpenMeteo Weather API)
- City search (OpenMeteo Geocoding API)
- Saving history and favourite cities (React states and browser cookies)
- Responsive design (adapted to mobile / tablet / desktop)

### Technologies used
- React (Hooks & Functional Components)
- Vite
- OpenMeteo API (npm package & Fetch API for a standalone endpoint)
- CSS Modules
 
### Installation

1. Clone the repository
    ```
    git clone https://github.com/Kak0ytachel/SimpleWeather.git
    ```
2. Install dependencies
    ```
    cd SimpleWeather/
    npm install
    ```
3. Run the app
    ```
    npm run dev
    ```
4. Open http://localhost:5173/ in your browser
